nasb.text: He said to me, “Son of man, have you seen this?” Then he brought me back to the bank of the river.

esv.text: And he said to me, “Son of man, have you seen this?” Then he led me back to the bank of the river.

cnv.text: 他對我說：“人子啊！你看到了嗎？”他就領著我，帶我回到河邊。

ccb.text: 他问我：“人子啊，你看见了什么？” 然后，他带我回到河边，
